sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 20.29 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.20)

statement.latex: Let$S$be a non-abelian finite simple group. Is it true that for any$n$, if the set of class sizes of a centreless finite group$G$is the same as the set of class sizes of the direct power$S^n$, then$G S^n$? This is proved for$S=Alt_5^2$in (J.~Algebra Appl., { 21}, no.\,11 (2022), Article ID 2250226, 8 p.). { I.\,B.\,Gorshkov}

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory VI_BRIDGING; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
reiAssessment.formalizationNotes: Kourovka problems are typically research-level group theory
